scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/client && npm run build --workspace apps/server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/client && npm run lint --workspace apps/server
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -b apps/client && npx tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.eslint.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace apps/client && npm run test --workspace apps/server
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test --workspace apps/client && npm run test --workspace apps/server && npm run build
